text:
Delhi - +91-9813745882
dineshtyagi1511@gmail.com - LinkedIn - GitHub

Aspiring Machine Learning Engineer specializing in Generative AI and NLP , with hands-on experience building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems and scalable ML applications. Proficient in FastAPI, LangChain, vector databases (Qdrant), and OpenAI models , along with strong expertise in MLOps, CI/CD, Docker, and AWS deployment . Demonstrated ability to design and deploy end-to-end production-ready AI systems .

Programming:
Python
Machine Learning & Data Science: Scikit-learn,Feature Engineering, Model Evaluation, Statistical Analysis Generative AI & NLP:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, Text Sum- marization, Embeddings
MLOps & Engineering: ML Pipelines, Experiment Tracking (Weights & Biases), Docker, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), YAML Configuration
Backend & APIs: FastAPI, Flask, RESTful APIs, Swagger/OpenAPI
Vector Databases:
Qdrant
Cloud & DevOps:
AWS (EC2, ECR, App Runner), Git, GitHub, Linux

[GitHub](https://github.com/dineshtyagi1511/rag-qa-project)
- Built a production-ready Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using FastAPI, OpenAI (GPT5), and LangChain .
- Implemented document ingestion pipeline using PyPDF2 , with chunking and embedding storage in Qdrant vector database .
- Designed RESTful APIs for document upload and question answering with Swagger documentation.
- Deployed scalable backend service on AWS App Runner .
- Containerized application using Docker and automated deployment with GitHub Actions (CI/CD) .

[GitHub](https://github.com/dineshtyagi1511/text-summarizer)
- Fine-tuned google/flan-t5-base on SAMSumdataset using Hugging Face Transformers (Seq2SeqTrainer) .
- Implemented experiment tracking and inference logging using Weights & Biases (W&B Weave) .
- Built FastAPI inference service for real-time text summarization with optimized model loading pipeline.
- Containerized application using Docker (linux/amd64) and deployed on AWS App Runner via ECR .
- Designed automated CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions for testing, building, and deployment.

- Designed an end-to-end ML system following an Experiment → Production workflow.
- Developed RESTful APIs using Flask for real-time predictions.
- Built multi-stage pipeline including data ingestion, validation, transformation, training, and evaluation.
- Containerized with Docker and deployed on AWS (EC2, ECR) with CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

Kurukshetra University - Master of Science (M.Sc.) in Statistics
Aug 2024 - May 2026
Relevant Coursework: Time-Series Forecasting, Probability, Statistical Inference
Deenbandhu Chhotu Ram University of Science and Technology, Murthal (Haryana) - Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) in Mathematics Aug 2020 - Jun 2023
Relevant Coursework: Probability, Database Management Systems (DBMS), Linear Algebra, Calculus

Jun 2025 - Jul 2025
- Analyzed structured datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and SQL to extract actionable insights.
- Wrote optimized SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, and reporting.
- Performed data cleaning, preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis (EDA) to improve data quality and usability.
- Collaborated with team members to support data-driven decision-making and business insights.
